title: Conversations on Music and Art and Life
content:
Conversations on Music and Art and Life



____________________________________________________________










____________________________________________________________


Rob and Anthony - November 11/07/24


Rob's first message:
I cant wait to play music with you again

Anthony's first message:
Me too, my friend
I’ve been developing an idea for an album id like to make for awhile now, and I just listened to something that inspired me further
Ugh!
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZbJuAyKpJzc&t=3237s
So fucking beautiful
I want to make an album that references all of my musical influences from the past into the present. so originals with samples from songs of the past and present, interspersed with cover songs. And it will be one cohesive piece of music, that works all together as an album and even as one song made up of smaller movements
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 1 (chunk 1/10)
